name: Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sugars with butter until smooth.
2. Add eggs to the mixture and blend until well combined.
3. Incorporate vanilla, salt, and baking soda into the mixture.
4. Gradually add the flour and chopped figs alternately.
5. Transfer the mixture to a small greased roasting pan.
6. Bake for approximately 20 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit or until lightly browned.
This recipe can also be used to make cookies.
